login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Use your hospital account to access the scheduling system
login.identifierRequired: Please enter your email or username
login.heroTitle: CT Scan Department Operations & Scheduling Platform
login.heroDescription: The specialized digital system for organizing doctor and technician shifts in the CT Scan Department, ensuring continuous 24/7 scanner coverage, and managing emergency and daily assignments with maximum precision.
login.secureAccessDescription: Automated shift allocation ensuring uninterrupted coverage of CT scanning suites and emergency cases, with real-time tracking of attendance and duties adhering to top clinical standards.
login.feature1Desc: Live monitoring of CT room operations and staff readiness.
login.feature2Desc: Rapid deployment and assignment of CT technologists for critical cases.

register.title: Create New Account
register.subtitle: Enter your employment details to join the scheduling system
register.heroDescription: Create a new account for CT Scan department practitioners and staff for instant access to official shift schedules and assignments.
register.verificationDescription: Your employee number is automatically linked to the radiology department organizational structure upon registration with immediate permission activation.
register.successMessage: Redirecting you to your personal dashboard and shift schedule...
